instructions: Populate `mappings` with externally verified review-member to baseline-geometry links.
Each row should point to a real MIDAS baseline member or element id via `baseline_focus_member_id`.
Keep `review_member_id`, `review_case_id`, or `review_keys` aligned with the semantic ids that appear in KDS/code-check artifacts such as C-TST-003.
Do not guess mappings. Leave rows empty until there is a trustworthy external registry or reviewer-approved bridge source.

mapping_schema_example.note: Replace this example with a reviewer-approved exact bridge.
